title: Product Catalog API
description: The product catalog API allows the merchants to create a catalog and organise the products with detailed specifications under their store.

apis.heading: Create Product Catalog
apis.description: This API lets you to create a product catalog for your store to make an effortless product organisation in the catalog.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the catalog will be created.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: productcatalogId
resParams.description: Unique ID of the newly created catalog.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Product Catalogs
apis.description: Retrieves all product catalogs under the store.
apis.query: To Fetch Catalogs under store API pass in mandatory query param storeId as string.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: productcatalogId
resParams.description: List of product catalogs Id's existing under store.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Create Product
apis.description: This API allows you to create a product in the product catalog.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the product will be created.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the product.

reqParams.name: type
reqParams.description: A Product can exist in two ways as the following,

possibleValues.description: Its refers to tangible things sold for the exchange of a fee.
Refers to action provided in exchange for a fee.

reqParams.name: unitType
reqParams.description: This refers to the way a product is measured or quantified.

possibleValues.description: Pre-packaged products sold in fixed units.
Product sold by weight or volume.

reqParams.name: costPrice
reqParams.description: Cost price of the product.

reqParams.name: sellingPrice
reqParams.description: Selling price of the product.

reqParams.name: currencyCode
reqParams.description: It refers to the standardised code used to represent a specific currency.

reqParams.name: tax
reqParams.description: Array of taxes.

reqParams.name: percentage
reqParams.description: Percentage of the tax for the product.

reqParams.name: type
reqParams.description: Type of the tax. Tax type supported currently is 'vat'.

reqParams.name: variantCategory
reqParams.description: Defines the different variants available for the product.

reqParams.name: label
reqParams.description: User defined Label for the variant category.

reqParams.name: Key
reqParams.description: Key of the variant.

reqParams.name: variantCategories
reqParams.description: Describes the different variants available for the product.

reqParams.name: category
reqParams.description: The user defined variant category under variantCategory.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the variant.

reqParams.name: value
reqParams.description: Value of the variant.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: Description of the product.

reqParams.name: unit
reqParams.description: This refers to the metric unit of the item. The possible values are 'm' , 'mm' , 'cm' , 'km' , 'in' , 'ft' , 'mi' , 'kg' , 'g' , 'mg' , 'lb' , 'oz' , 'l' , 'ml' , 'cu. m' , 'gal' , 'pt' , 'fl oz' , 'W' , 'kW' , 'kWh' , 'sq m' , 'sq km' , 'sq ft' , 'h' , 'min' , 's' , 'days' , 'wk' , 'mn' , 'yr' , 'nos'.

reqParams.name: category
reqParams.description: Category of the product.

reqParams.name: productImages
reqParams.description: An array of URLs showcasing the product.

reqParams.name: hsnCode
reqParams.description: A 6-digit uniform code that identifies the product.

reqParams.name: barCode
reqParams.description: Encoded white and black lines on the product.

reqParams.name: productProperties
reqParams.description: Additional properties that help describe the product like size, origin, weight, manufacturer, etc.

reqParams.name: monthlyPlans
reqParams.description: Refers to the charges of the product or service for a specific time period.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Amount of the plan.

reqParams.name: currencyCode
reqParams.description: It refers to the standardised code used to represent a specific currency.

reqParams.name: interval
reqParams.description: This refers to the time period of the billing plan.

reqParams.name: intervalCount
reqParams.description: Duration of the plan.

reqParams.name: recurring
reqParams.description: Denotes if the billing plan should repeat at regular intervals.

reqParams.name: bindingPeriod
reqParams.description: A binding period is a set timeframe for a billing plan to which the customer is expected to adhere.

reqParams.name: earlyTerminationPenalty
reqParams.description: It is the additional amount charged in case of early termination if applicable.

reqParams.name: earlyTermination
reqParams.description: Defines the intended action to be taken if the plan is terminated early.

possibleValues.description: No penalty charged for early termination.
Customer has to pay the balance amount id terminated early.
Customer has the pay the remaining amount plus a penalty amount.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: Unique ID of the newly added product.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch all products
apis.description: This API allows you to retrieve all products associated with a product catalog.
apis.query: To Fetch all products API pass in mandatory query param storeId as string.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: products
resParams.description: Details of the products.

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: ID of the product.

resParams.name: unit

resParams.name: productProperties
resParams.description: Denotes the additional variants that describe the products details which includes type, size, origin, weight, manufacturer, etc.

resParams.name: inventory
resParams.description: Defines the information about the stock levels of the products listed in the catalog.

resParams.name: unitType

possibleValues.description: Pre-packaged products sold in fixed units.
Products sold by weight or volume.

resParams.name: relatedProducts
resParams.description: It refers  to add product with some other relatable product.

resParams.name: billingPlans
resParams.description: Refers to schedule of individual billing dates for the products.

resParams.name: campaignId
resParams.description: ID of the campaign.

resParams.name: fixedAmount
resParams.description: Fixed amount of the products.

resParams.name: percentage
resParams.description: Percentage of the products.

resParams.name: bundles
resParams.description: Refers to the products grouped together in a category.

resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Add Variant For Product
apis.description: This API allows you to add a variant to an existing product in the product catalog.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the product exists.

reqParams.name: variants
reqParams.description: Specifications of the product.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the variant.

reqParams.name: description
reqParams.description: Description of the variant.

reqParams.name: costPrice
reqParams.description: Cost price of the variant.

reqParams.name: sellingPrice
reqParams.description: Selling price of the variant.

reqParams.name: currencyCode
reqParams.description: It refers to the standardised code used to represent a specific currency.

reqParams.name: hsnCode
reqParams.description: A 6-digit uniform code that classifies for the known variant.

reqParams.name: barCode
reqParams.description: A 6-digit uniform code that identifies the variant.

reqParams.name: productImages
reqParams.description: An array of URLs showcasing the variant images.

reqParams.name: attributeValues
reqParams.description: Use to show the available variants of the products.

reqParams.name: attributeKey
reqParams.description: This refers to the category of the variant.

reqParams.name: displayName
reqParams.description: Name of the variant.

reqParams.name: value
reqParams.description: Value of the variant.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: variants
resParams.description: Unique ID of the newly added variants.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.description: This API helps you to tag the product with other relatable products in the catalog.

reqParams.name: storeId

reqParams.description: An array of product Id's.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

apis.heading: Update Product Inventory
apis.description: Update available stocks in the product inventory using this API.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the product exists.

reqParams.name: operation
reqParams.description: Defines the way in which the existing stock is modified.

possibleValues.description: Indicates an addition to the currently available stock.
Decrease the quantity in available stock.

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Defines the number of units of a specific product that are available in stock.

reqParams.name: unit
reqParams.description: This refers to the metric unit of the item. The possible values are 'm' , 'mm' , 'cm' , 'km' , 'in' , 'ft' , 'mi' , 'kg' , 'g' , 'mg' , 'lb' , 'oz' , 'l' , 'ml' , 'cu. m' , 'gal' , 'pt' , 'fl oz' , 'W' , 'kW' , 'kWh' , 'sq m' , 'sq km' , 'sq ft' , 'h' , 'min' , 's' , 'days' , 'wk' , 'mn' , 'yr' , 'nos'.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Generate Product Description
apis.description: Generate AI-powered product descriptions based on product name, word length, and language preferences. Use this API to create compelling, professional product descriptions that enhance your product listings and improve customer engagement.

reqParams.name: productName
reqParams.description: Name of the product for which to generate the description.

reqParams.name: maxWordLength
reqParams.description: Maximum number of words for the generated description.

reqParams.name: langCode
reqParams.description: Language code for the description generation (e.g., 'en' for English).

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing the generated description.

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: AI-generated product description.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Generate Product Images
apis.description: Generate AI-powered product images based on product name, custom prompts, and specifications. Use this API to create professional product images that enhance your product catalog and marketing materials.

reqParams.name: productName
reqParams.description: Name of the product for which to generate images.

reqParams.name: prompt
reqParams.description: Custom prompt describing the desired image characteristics and style.

reqParams.name: noOfImages
reqParams.description: Number of images to generate for the product.

reqParams.name: langCode
reqParams.description: Language code for image generation context (e.g., 'en' for English).

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing the generated image paths.

resParams.name: imagePath
resParams.description: Array of URLs pointing to the generated product images.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Generate Product Catalog from Images
apis.description: Generate product catalog data with images and menu information from existing image data. Use this API to extract structured product information from menu images or catalog photos, automatically creating product listings with descriptions and pricing.

reqParams.name: imgData
reqParams.description: Array of image URLs or base64 encoded image data to process.

reqParams.name: imageType
reqParams.description: Array of image file types corresponding to the imgData array (e.g., 'png', 'jpg').

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing extracted menu and product information.

resParams.name: menuData
resParams.description: Array of extracted product/menu items with their details.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the product or menu item.

resParams.name: description
resParams.description: Description of the product or menu item.

resParams.name: sellingPrice
resParams.description: Price of the product or menu item.

resParams.name: currencyCode
resParams.description: Currency code for the price (e.g., '840' for USD).

resParams.name: category
resParams.description: Category classification of the product or menu item.

resParams.name: image
resParams.description: URL of the generated or associated product image.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Get Product Statistics
apis.description: Retrieve comprehensive statistics for a specific product including sales data, inventory status, VAT breakdown, and variant performance metrics within an optional date range.
apis.query: Optionally pass startDate and endDate query parameters in YYYY-MM-DD format to filter statistics by date range.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing product statistics.

resParams.name: productId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the product.

resParams.name: productName
resParams.description: Name of the product.

resParams.name: unit
resParams.description: Unit of measurement for the product.

resParams.name: query
resParams.description: The date range used for filtering statistics.

resParams.name: startDate
resParams.description: Start date of the statistics period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

resParams.name: endDate
resParams.description: End date of the statistics period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

resParams.name: statistics
resParams.description: Sales and performance statistics for the product.

resParams.name: byCurrency
resParams.description: Statistics broken down by currency.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency code.

resParams.name: totalUnitsSold
resParams.description: Total number of units sold.

resParams.name: totalUnitsReturned
resParams.description: Total number of units returned.

resParams.name: totalRevenue
resParams.description: Total revenue generated.

resParams.name: totalVat
resParams.description: Total VAT collected.

resParams.name: totalCampaignDiscount
resParams.description: Total campaign discount applied.

resParams.name: orderCount
resParams.description: Total number of orders containing this product.

resParams.name: averageOrderValue
resParams.description: Average order value for orders containing this product.

resParams.name: netUnitsSold
resParams.description: Net units sold after accounting for returns.

resParams.name: inventoryStatus
resParams.description: Current inventory status of the product.

resParams.name: currentStock
resParams.description: Current stock quantity available.

resParams.name: stockIn
resParams.description: Total stock added during the period.

resParams.name: stockOut
resParams.description: Total stock removed during the period.

resParams.name: vatBreakdown
resParams.description: VAT breakdown by percentage.

resParams.name: vatPercentage
resParams.description: VAT percentage applied.

resParams.name: vatAmount
resParams.description: Total VAT amount collected at this percentage.

resParams.name: taxableAmount
resParams.description: Total taxable amount at this percentage.

resParams.name: variants
resParams.description: Statistics for each product variant.

resParams.name: variantId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the variant.

resParams.name: variantName
resParams.description: Name of the variant.

resParams.name: unit
resParams.description: Unit of measurement for the variant.

resParams.name: byCurrency
resParams.description: Variant statistics broken down by currency.

resParams.name: inventoryStatus
resParams.description: Current inventory status of the variant.

resParams.name: vatBreakdown
resParams.description: VAT breakdown for the variant.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
